title: Fortnite Chat
description: Discord-style chat app for Fortnite, with real-time presence, full Fortnite stats on profiles, and a dedicated datamining channel that auto-posts new cosmetics and shop resets.

title: Fortnite Companion
description: Companion web app for Fortnite. Item shop, news, player stats lookup, map with POIs, weapon comparison engine, cosmetics browser, and a daily-tracked shop history.

title: Fortnite Datamining
description: Auto-fetches data from fortnite-api.com every 30 minutes and commits changes to a public Git repo. Includes a per-item registry of every cosmetic's lifetime data, daily shop snapshots, and a generated CHANGELOG.

title: Fortnite Datamining Bot
description: Discord bot that polls the datamining repo and posts rich update messages — new cosmetics with images, shop resets with prices, news posts, build alerts. Wishlist DMs when tracked skins drop.

title: TV
description: A self-hostable "currently watching" API for Prime Video, Netflix, and Disney+. Chrome extension scrapes the title, posts to a Cloudflare Worker, displays on your personal site.

title: arhan.dev
description: This site. Personal site with bio, blog, projects, live status pills, and a few interactive tools.
